name: Edison Middle School
description: Edison Middle School is a place to play pickleball in Green Bay, WI. There are 6 outdoor asphalt courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. Amenities include lights. The courts are free.

name: Fort Howard Park
description: Fort Howard Park is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Green Bay, WI. There are 6 outdoor asphalt courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. The courts are free. Amenities include restrooms and water.

name: Four Seasons Park
description: Four Seasons Park is a place to play pickleball in Hobart, WI. There are 4 outdoor asphalt and hard courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. The courts are free. Players have access to restrooms.

name: Four Seasons Tennis Club
description: Four Seasons Tennis Club is a place to play pickleball in Green Bay, WI. There are 10 indoor asphalt courts. Tape lines have been laid, and portable nets are available. The facility includes amenities like food, locker rooms, restrooms, water, youth programming, lights, trainers or lessons, and adaptive programming. You can’t reserve the courts.
open_play_schedule: Please call Western Racquet to set up court times at: 920-497-1161

name: Greater Green Bay YMCA
description: Greater Green Bay YMCA is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Green Bay, WI. There are 3 indoor courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. Reservations are available. A membership is required to play.

name: Green Bay Tennis Center
description: Green Bay Tennis Center is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in De Pere, WI. There are 6 indoor hard courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. Reservations are available. A one-time fee is required to play. Amenities include restrooms.
fees: Fee required — Green Bay Tennis Center Members $7 per visit  /  Non Member $10 per visit

name: Howard Commons Activity Complex
description: Howard Commons Activity Complex is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Green Bay, WI. There are 4 outdoor concrete courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. Amenities include lights, water, restrooms, and food. A one-time fee is required to play.

name: Idlewild
description: Come play pickleball at Idlewild in Suamico, WI! There are 4 outdoor asphalt courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. The courts are free. Players have access to restrooms.

name: Josten Park
description: Josten Park is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Green Bay, WI. There are 4 outdoor hard courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. The courts are free. Amenities include restrooms and water.

name: Legion Park
description:
Restrooms only available in summer hours because attached to the pool and park.

Courts are individually fenced in.
open_play_schedule: Open play.  No formal schedules.  We ask players to be respectful and allow others to join in or limit their play time to 2 hours.  First come-first serve.

name: Meadowbrook Park
description: Meadowbrook Park is a place to play pickleball in Green Bay, WI. There are 6 outdoor asphalt courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. The facility includes amenities like restrooms. The courts are free.

name: Pulaski Veterans Memorial Park
description: Pulaski Veterans Memorial Park is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Pulaski, WI. There is 1 outdoor concrete court. This is a dedicated court with a permanent net and lines. The court is free. Amenities include lights.

name: Quarry Park
description: Come play pickleball at Quarry Park in De Pere, WI! There are 2 outdoor hard courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. The courts are free. The facility includes amenities like restrooms.

name: Salvation Army Ray & Joan Kroc Corps Community Center
description: Salvation Army Ray & Joan Kroc Corps Community Center is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Green Bay, WI. There are 3 indoor wood courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. The facility includes amenities like restrooms, water, locker rooms, lights, and wheelchair accessibility. A one-time fee is required to play. Reservations are not available.
fees: Fee required — Insurance reimbursement plans accepted for a free membership: Silversneakers, Silver & Fit, Renew Active. Day Pass costs: 3-11 yrs $5, 12-26 $10, Adult 27-61 $15, Senior 62+ $10

name: The Picklr Green Bay
description: Private event space available.

name: VFW Pickleball Court
description: VFW Pickleball Court is a place to play pickleball in De Pere, WI. There are 2 outdoor asphalt courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. The courts are free. Amenities include restrooms and wheelchair accessibility.

name: Village of Allouez - Kiwanis Park
description: Village of Allouez - Kiwanis Park is a place to play pickleball in Green Bay, WI. There are 6 outdoor asphalt courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. Reservations are available. Amenities include restrooms and water. The courts are free.
